rationale: No headlines this cycle carry meaningful direct or indirect impact on Portugal's cost of living, tourism, energy, or domestic affairs.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal signals continued global trade activity; indirect positive signal for EU trade environment but no direct impact on Portugal.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in Cártama, Spain (near Málaga) is geographically close and may prompt minor safety reviews at similar Iberian tourist events.

top_events.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
top_events.summary: G7 protests in Geneva are a European event with no direct consequence for Portugal's daily life or economy.
